title: Oil falls as OPEC considers further supply hikes
section_path: Oil falls as OPEC considers further supply hikes
section_path_text: Oil falls as OPEC considers further supply hikes
summary:
Main
A risk-off tone weighed on sentiment across the commodity complex. Fear of rising supply pushed oil lower. Gold weakened amid a stronger USD.

children.title: Main
children.summary: A risk-off tone weighed on sentiment across the commodity complex. Fear of rising supply pushed oil lower.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil slumped amid fears of rising supply. Reports surfaced that the OPEC+ alliance is considering a potential increase in output of 411kb/d in July.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: Inventories of aluminium held on global exchanges have been falling steadily over the past 12 months. Despite concerns about the economic backdrop, limited supply growth is keeping the market tight.
